prompt: Create a highly detailed magical-realism pop-up book scene on a wooden table, where an open antique book transforms into a miniature classical Chinese garden in warm golden autumn light. The left page stands upright like parchment, with aged paper, decorative corner borders, creeping vines, and vertical Chinese calligraphy headed 赠刘景文, followed by 宋·苏轼 and the poem text 荷尽已无擎雨盖，菊残犹有傲霜枝。一年好景君须记，最是橙黄橘绿时。. The right and lower pages unfold into a three-dimensional garden: a tranquil koi pond, one arched wooden bridge, a traditional tiled-roof pavilion and courtyard wall in the background, mossy scholar rocks, one bamboo fence, orange and green citrus trees heavy with fruit, dried chrysanthemums, lotus seed pods, and fallen leaves. Include exactly 2 visible birds perched on the left page branches, exactly 3 koi fish in the pond, exactly 3 butterflies fluttering near flowers and rocks, exactly 3 stone lanterns or garden lamps, and exactly 1 squirrel sitting on a mossy rock at the right side. Use late autumn atmosphere with orange-yellow foliage, frosty moss details, soft haze, sparkling backlight, shallow depth of field, and volumetric sunlight filtering through leaves. Style: ultra-detailed cinematic 3D diorama, handcrafted paper-and-miniature texture, realistic book pages and water reflections, warm amber palette, whimsical but elegant Song dynasty garden mood, no modern objects, no watermark.
